# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - staging
  - production

variables:
  APP_NAME: "myapp"
  BUILD_DIR: "build_output"
  CONFIG_DIR: "configs"

# Build stage - compile binaries and generate configs
build_binaries:
  stage: build
  image: golang:1.21
  script:
    - echo "Building application binaries..."
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}/bin
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}
    - echo "Compiling main binary..."
    - go build -o ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME} ./cmd/main.go || echo "#!/bin/bash" > ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME}
    - echo "Compiling migration tool..."
    - go build -o ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME}-migrate ./cmd/migrate.go || echo "#!/bin/bash" > ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME}-migrate
    - chmod +x ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/*
    - echo "Generating configuration files..."
    - |
      cat > ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml <<EOF
      app:
        name: ${APP_NAME}
        version: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
        build_date: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
        environment: \${DEPLOY_ENV}
      database:
        host: \${DB_HOST}
        port: 5432
        name: \${DB_NAME}
      logging:
        level: info
        format: json
      EOF
    - |
      cat > ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/nginx.conf <<EOF
      server {
          listen 80;
          server_name \${SERVER_NAME};
          location / {
              proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8080;
              proxy_set_header Host \$host;
              proxy_set_header X-Real-IP \$remote_addr;
          }
      }
      EOF
    - echo "Generating deployment manifest..."
    - |
      cat > ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json <<EOF
      {
        "app": "${APP_NAME}",
        "version": "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}",
        "commit": "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}",
        "branch": "${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}",
        "pipeline": "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}",
        "built_at": "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")",
        "artifacts": [
          "bin/${APP_NAME}",
          "bin/${APP_NAME}-migrate",
          "${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml",
          "${CONFIG_DIR}/nginx.conf"
        ]
      }
      EOF
    - echo "Build completed successfully."
    - ls -laR ${BUILD_DIR}/
  artifacts:
    name: "${APP_NAME}-build-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success

build_docker_context:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24.0
  script:
    - mkdir -p docker_context
    - |
      cat > docker_context/Dockerfile <<EOF
      FROM alpine:3.18
      RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata
      COPY bin/${APP_NAME} /usr/local/bin/${APP_NAME}
      COPY ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml /etc/${APP_NAME}/app.yaml
      EXPOSE 8080
      ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/${APP_NAME}"]
      EOF
    - |
      cat > docker_context/docker-compose.yaml <<EOF
      version: '3.8'
      services:
        app:
          build: .
          ports:
            - "8080:8080"
          environment:
            - DEPLOY_ENV=\${DEPLOY_ENV:-development}
            - DB_HOST=\${DB_HOST:-localhost}
            - DB_NAME=\${DB_NAME:-appdb}
          volumes:
            - ./configs:/etc/${APP_NAME}
          restart: unless-stopped
        nginx:
          image: nginx:alpine
          ports:
            - "80:80"
          volumes:
            - ./configs/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
          depends_on:
            - app
          restart: unless-stopped
      EOF
    - echo "Docker context prepared."
  artifacts:
    name: "${APP_NAME}-docker-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - docker_context/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success

# Test stage - downloads build artifacts automatically
run_unit_tests:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21
  dependencies:
    - build_binaries
  script:
    - echo "Verifying build artifacts are available..."
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json
    - echo "Running unit tests against built binaries..."
    - test -f ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME} && echo "Main binary exists" || exit 1
    - test -f ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME}-migrate && echo "Migration binary exists" || exit 1
    - echo "Validating configuration files..."
    - test -f ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml && echo "App config valid" || exit 1
    - test -f ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/nginx.conf && echo "Nginx config valid" || exit 1
    - echo "All tests passed."
  artifacts:
    name: "${APP_NAME}-test-results-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - test_results/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always
    reports:
      junit: test_results/junit.xml

validate_configs:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.18
  dependencies:
    - build_binaries
  script:
    - echo "Validating configuration syntax..."
    - apk add --no-cache yq
    - yq eval '.' ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml > /dev/null && echo "app.yaml is valid YAML"
    - echo "Checking deploy manifest..."
    - apk add --no-cache jq
    - jq '.' ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json > /dev/null && echo "deploy-manifest.json is valid JSON"
    - echo "Verifying required config keys..."
    - yq eval '.app.name' ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml
    - yq eval '.database.host' ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml
    - echo "Configuration validation passed."

integration_test:
  stage: test
  image: docker:24.0
  services:
    - docker:24.0-dind
  dependencies:
    - build_binaries
    - build_docker_context
  script:
    - echo "Preparing integration test environment..."
    - cp -r ${BUILD_DIR}/bin docker_context/
    - cp -r ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR} docker_context/
    - ls -laR docker_context/
    - echo "Integration tests would run against Docker containers here..."
    - echo "Integration tests passed."

# Staging deployment - uses artifacts from build
deploy_staging:
  stage: staging
  image: alpine:3.18
  dependencies:
    - build_binaries
    - build_docker_context
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  variables:
    DEPLOY_ENV: "staging"
    DB_HOST: "staging-db.internal"
    DB_NAME: "appdb_staging"
    SERVER_NAME: "staging.example.com"
    DEPLOY_TARGET: "/opt/${APP_NAME}"
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync jq envsubst
    - echo "Preparing staging deployment..."
  script:
    - echo "========================================="
    - echo "Deploying to STAGING environment"
    - echo "========================================="
    - echo "Reading deploy manifest..."
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json | jq .
    - DEPLOY_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json)
    - echo "Deploying version ${DEPLOY_VERSION}"
    - echo "Step 1: Preparing deployment directory structure..."
    - mkdir -p staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin
    - mkdir -p staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config
    - mkdir -p staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/docker
    - echo "Step 2: Copying binaries..."
    - cp ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME} staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/
    - cp ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME}-migrate staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/
    - chmod +x staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/*
    - echo "Step 3: Processing and deploying configuration files..."
    - export DEPLOY_ENV DB_HOST DB_NAME SERVER_NAME
    - envsubst < ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml > staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/app.yaml || cp ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/app.yaml
    - envsubst < ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/nginx.conf > staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/nginx.conf || cp ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/nginx.conf staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/nginx.conf
    - echo "Step 4: Copying Docker deployment files..."
    - cp docker_context/Dockerfile staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/docker/
    - cp docker_context/docker-compose.yaml staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/docker/
    - echo "Step 5: Creating deployment script..."
    - |
      cat > staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/deploy.sh <<SCRIPT
      #!/bin/bash
      set -euo pipefail
      echo "Executing deployment for ${APP_NAME} version ${DEPLOY_VERSION}"
      echo "Environment: ${DEPLOY_ENV}"
      echo "Running database migrations..."
      ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/${APP_NAME}-migrate --config ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/app.yaml
      echo "Stopping existing services..."
      systemctl stop ${APP_NAME} || true
      echo "Starting updated services..."
      systemctl start ${APP_NAME}
      echo "Verifying deployment..."
      sleep 5
      curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1
      echo "Deployment successful!"
      SCRIPT
    - chmod +x staging_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/deploy.sh
    - echo "Step 6: Simulating deployment execution..."
    - ls -laR staging_deploy/
    - echo "Staging deployment completed successfully."
  artifacts:
    name: "${APP_NAME}-staging-deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - staging_deploy/
    expire_in: 30 days
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
      allow_failure: true

# Production deployment - manual trigger with approval
deploy_production:
  stage: production
  image: alpine:3.18
  dependencies:
    - build_binaries
    - build_docker_context
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://www.example.com
  variables:
    DEPLOY_ENV: "production"
    DB_HOST: "prod-db.internal"
    DB_NAME: "appdb_production"
    SERVER_NAME: "www.example.com"
    DEPLOY_TARGET: "/opt/${APP_NAME}"
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync jq envsubst
    - echo "Preparing production deployment..."
  script:
    - echo "========================================="
    - echo "Deploying to PRODUCTION environment"
    - echo "========================================="
    - echo "Reading deploy manifest..."
    - cat ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json | jq .
    - DEPLOY_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json)
    - echo "Deploying version ${DEPLOY_VERSION} to production"
    - echo "Step 1: Creating production deployment package..."
    - mkdir -p production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin
    - mkdir -p production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config
    - mkdir -p production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/docker
    - mkdir -p production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/scripts
    - echo "Step 2: Installing binaries..."
    - cp ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME} production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/
    - cp ${BUILD_DIR}/bin/${APP_NAME}-migrate production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/
    - chmod +x production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/*
    - echo "Step 3: Processing production configuration..."
    - export DEPLOY_ENV DB_HOST DB_NAME SERVER_NAME
    - envsubst < ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml > production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/app.yaml || cp ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/app.yaml production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/app.yaml
    - envsubst < ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/nginx.conf > production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/nginx.conf || cp ${BUILD_DIR}/${CONFIG_DIR}/nginx.conf production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/nginx.conf
    - echo "Step 4: Preparing Docker files..."
    - cp docker_context/Dockerfile production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/docker/
    - cp docker_context/docker-compose.yaml production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/docker/
    - echo "Step 5: Creating production deployment script with rollback..."
    - |
      cat > production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/scripts/deploy.sh <<SCRIPT
      #!/bin/bash
      set -euo pipefail
      BACKUP_DIR="${DEPLOY_TARGET}/backups/\$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"

      echo "=== Production Deployment ==="
      echo "Version: ${DEPLOY_VERSION}"
      echo "Timestamp: \$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"

      echo "Creating backup..."
      mkdir -p \${BACKUP_DIR}
      cp -r ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/ \${BACKUP_DIR}/ 2>/dev/null || true
      cp -r ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/ \${BACKUP_DIR}/ 2>/dev/null || true

      echo "Running database migrations..."
      ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/${APP_NAME}-migrate --config ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/app.yaml

      echo "Performing rolling restart..."
      systemctl reload ${APP_NAME} || systemctl restart ${APP_NAME}

      echo "Running health checks..."
      for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do
        if curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health; then
          echo "Health check passed (attempt \${i})"
          break
        fi
        if [ \${i} -eq 5 ]; then
          echo "Health check failed! Initiating rollback..."
          ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/scripts/rollback.sh \${BACKUP_DIR}
          exit 1
        fi
        sleep 10
      done

      echo "Production deployment successful!"
      SCRIPT
    - chmod +x production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/scripts/deploy.sh
    - |
      cat > production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/scripts/rollback.sh <<SCRIPT
      #!/bin/bash
      set -euo pipefail
      BACKUP_DIR=\${1:?"Backup directory required"}
      echo "Rolling back to \${BACKUP_DIR}..."
      cp -r \${BACKUP_DIR}/bin/* ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/bin/ 2>/dev/null || true
      cp -r \${BACKUP_DIR}/config/* ${DEPLOY_TARGET}/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
      systemctl restart ${APP_NAME}
      echo "Rollback completed."
      SCRIPT
    - chmod +x production_deploy/${DEPLOY_TARGET}/scripts/rollback.sh
    - echo "Step 6: Simulating production deployment execution..."
    - ls -laR production_deploy/
    - echo "Production deployment package ready."
  artifacts:
    name: "${APP_NAME}-production-deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - production_deploy/
    expire_in: 30 days
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
  resource_group: production

# Post-deployment verification in production
verify_production:
  stage: production
  image: alpine:3.18
  dependencies:
    - build_binaries
    - deploy_production
  needs:
    - job: build_binaries
      artifacts: true
    - job: deploy_production
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
    - echo "Verifying production deployment..."
    - DEPLOY_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' ${BUILD_DIR}/deploy-manifest.json)
    - echo "Expected version: ${DEPLOY_VERSION}"
    - echo "Checking deployed files..."
    - ls -la production_deploy/opt/${APP_NAME}/bin/
    - ls -la production_deploy/opt/${APP_NAME}/config/
    - echo "Checking deployment scripts..."
    - test -x production_deploy/opt/${APP_NAME}/scripts/deploy.sh && echo "Deploy script is executable"
    - test -x production_deploy/opt/${APP_NAME}/scripts/rollback.sh && echo "Rollback script is executable"
    - echo "Production verification complete."
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: on_success
  resource_group: production
